title: v0.2-A: Shorts dual-layer real path + editorial hook/closure
description:
**Workstream A — Shorts.**

Make the approved stacked dual-layer renderer the real, tested path (face top / screen uncropped bottom / karaoke captions in the gap, 1080x1920) and demand hook-first, closure-last short editorial.

**Done:**
- `runs.discover_sources()` widened: screen = stem contains `screen`/`display`; camera = `camera`/`cam`/`webcam`/`face`/`talking`.
- `_render_segment_dual` validated pixel-level on a synthetic camera+screen pair (face square-cropped top, screen `force_original_aspect_ratio=decrease`+pad uncropped bottom, captions Y=944 in the gap).
- `prompts/cutplan.md` rule 7: shorts must START on a stakes hook and END on a hard "so what" closure.
- `docs/two-layer-ingest.md` documents the Descript two-layer export + `eddy run <dir>/` drop.
- Geometry unchanged (already matches the approved standard).

**Note:** single-composite dogfood uses the degraded single-panel fallback; the dual path is the real path when fed two layers.

title: v0.2-B: "Mouth moving, no sound" — audio-truth silence map + deterministic gate
description:
**Workstream B — highest priority.** Root cause: the editor inferred silence only from inter-word gaps, so sub-VAD lip-movement spans that transcribe no words survived.

**Done:**
- `transcribe/pack.py`: `detect_audio_silence()` / `build_audio_silence_map()` via ffmpeg `silencedetect` on `transcript/audio-16k.wav` -> cached `transcript/audio-silence.json` (ground truth, transcript-independent).
- `transcribe/whisper.py`: builds the silence map post-transcribe using `gates.silence_noise_db`.
- `edit/compiler.py`: `silence_cut_intervals()` removes word-free silent spans >= `silence_min_cut_s` leaving a 0.10s handle, with a word-overlap safety guard; `GAP_LEAVE_HANDLE_S` lowered 0.25 -> 0.12.
- `edit/simulate.py`: narrowed the protected-moment dead-air exception to spans it explicitly covers (no +/-1s).
- `qa/deterministic.py`: `silent_motion_gate()` FAILS the deterministic gate if non-protected silent spans survive the final render.
- `config.py`: GatesConfig silence thresholds.

**Validated:** 13/13 of Lennox's reported timestamps matched a real silent span; 133 cuttable spans / ~73s of dead air the old pipeline kept. 6 new compiler tests.

title: v0.2-C: Pacing — tighter clamp + beat-density directive + prompts
description:
**Workstream C — pacing.**

**Done:**
- `loop/controller.py`: over-target clamp `feasible_s * 0.9` -> `0.8`; `_directive_from` now names the heaviest beats via `sim['beat_density'][:4]` with a list-reading compression hint.
- `edit/simulate.py`: per-beat density (kept_s + WPM) computed and surfaced in the sim report as `beat_density`.
- `prompts/cutplan.md` rule 3: read-aloud lists -> keep intro + top 2-3, cut the rest; collapse slow screen-reading; front-load the first payoff.
- `prompts/judge.md`: pacing dimension scores information density and penalises a slow start.

**Validated:** dogfood `eddy plan` (claude_cli) cut 53.7min -> 39.0min in a single iteration (q4 baseline never got below 53.7 on iter 1).

title: v0.2-D: Editorial taste — setup->payoff protection + scoped cold-open
description:
**Workstream D — taste & structure.**

**Done:**
- `edit/protect.py` (new): `setup_protections()` regex-scans transition phrases ("let's look at", "now let's", "let me show you", "here's the", ...) and auto-adds short protected moments so a cut can't orphan its payoff (fixes the GPT 5.5 intro and "let's look at the scripts").
- `edit/schema.py`: `cold_open` field on EditDecisions.
- `edit/compiler.py`: scoped single-clip cold-open prepended first (<=15s, snapped to words, COLD_OPEN beat), then the normal linear edit; backward-compatible when unset.
- `edit/cutplan.py`: DECISIONS_SCHEMA `cold_open` property; `compile_with_repair` passes silence_spans + setup-protections through.
- `edit/simulate.py`: skips the non-monotonic cold-open boundary in boundary cards.
- `prompts/cutplan.md` rules 5 + 9.

**Validated:** brain set cold_open to source 20:43 ("the smartest model can't read a PDF about itself") and the compiled EDL's first range is `beat: COLD_OPEN` from that timestamp. Cold-open + setup-protection tests.

title: v0.2-E: Auto-upgrade editorial brain (claude_cli) + exit-43 settle-retry
description:
**Workstream E — brain upgrade.** Route only the editorial-reasoning calls (beat map, decisions, revisions, judge) to a stronger brain; transcription / render / QA / shorts stay 100% local.

**Done:**
- `providers/base.py`: `FallbackProvider` (primary -> local on ProviderError, logs `editorial_fallback`), `_editorial_available()`, `get_editorial_provider()` resolving `local`/`auto`/explicit. Editorial resolves claude_cli -> anthropic_api -> local ollama.
- `config.py`: `[provider] editorial = "auto"`.
- `edit/cutplan.py`, `qa/gate.py`, `loop/controller.py`: editorial passes use `get_editorial_provider`; receipts log which brain made each call.
- `providers/cli_subprocess.py`: the local pairing guard exits 43 ("corrected Claude Chrome pairing... Re-run") on first call. Now treated as a 3s settle + retry that does NOT consume the 2-attempt budget (capped at 2 settles), so a one-time pairing correction never wastes the editorial call and falls back to q4. 3 new provider tests.

**Validated:** receipts show editorial routed to claude_cli (77s vs q4's 516s); q4 alone truncated its JSON on the 54-min transcript.

title: v0.2-F: Studio Sound — local audio enhancement
description:
**Workstream F — Studio Sound.** Reverse-engineer Descript's Studio Sound locally; apply to RENDERED output only (sources stay byte-identical).

**Done:**
- `render/audio.py` (new): `studio_sound()` = optional DeepFilterNet denoise/dereverb -> ffmpeg speech EQ (highpass 80Hz + afftdn + presence lift ~3.5kHz + alimiter) -> two-pass EBU R128 loudnorm to -14 LUFS, remuxed over the copied video. `measure_lufs()`. Non-fatal (ffmpeg-only fallback when DeepFilterNet absent; logged).
- `render/shorts.py`: studio_sound per short after caption burn.
- `loop/controller.py`: studio_sound on the final long-form render; final deterministic gate runs with `check_loudness`.
- `qa/deterministic.py`: `loudness_gate()` (output integrated LUFS within band).
- `config.py`: `[audio]` block.

**Validated:** live-tested -19.7 -> -14.9 LUFS. deep-filter not on PATH on this machine -> ffmpeg-only chain (expected fallback).

title: v0.2-VERIFY: Full re-dogfood render end-to-end
description:
**Verification tracker (IN PROGRESS).** Full `eddy run` on the 54-min fable-mythos source, slug `dogfood-fable-mythos-v02`, target 12min, editorial=claude_cli, studio_sound on. Preserves the v0.1 baseline for diffing.

**Checklist (verify on completion):**
- [ ] source re-hash byte-identical (sha b13791d2...)
- [ ] no "mouth-moving-no-sound" survives (silent_motion_gate PASS)
- [ ] payoff reached faster; list segments compressed
- [ ] GPT 5.5 / "scripts" setups intact; titles retained
- [ ] 15:28 line lands as cold-open
- [ ] output integrated LUFS ~ -14 (loudness_gate)
- [ ] receipts: editorial routed to claude_cli, mechanical local
- [ ] launch kit emitted (long + shorts + titles + chapters + description + thumbnails)

37 unit tests green; branch `v0.2-cut-quality` (not merged, not pushed).
